overall.description: Aerial drone footage captured in Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing a slow flight through a neon-lit futuristic cityscape at night. The camera glides past towering glass skyscrapers adorned with holographic billboards and glowing window patterns, capturing the dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere with dominant cyan and magenta lighting.

agents.ego_description: piloting a drone slowly through the city canyon, maintaining steady altitude while panning left to survey the illuminated skyline

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a guitar with text 'SWEET DREAMS ARE MADE OF THIS' in cyan and orange colors
tall skyscraper with distinctive pink neon lighting on its facade, visible in the background
cluster of dark glass skyscrapers with numerous illuminated blue windows forming grid patterns
tall narrow skyscraper with vertical strips of lit windows and antenna structures on roof
various colorful neon signs and advertisements at street level below, including red and yellow illuminated text

segments.scene_description: The drone maintains a slow, steady flight through the cyberpunk city canyon, surrounded by towering glass structures bathed in cyan and pink neon light. The guitar advertisement billboard remains prominently visible throughout the segment while the surrounding skyscrapers gradually shift in perspective as the camera drifts leftward. The scene is devoid of visible pedestrians or vehicles at this elevated altitude, emphasizing the monumental scale of the architecture against the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, steady drone flight through a neon-lit urban canyon that emphasizes the monumental scale of a futuristic cityscape. It begins gliding through a corridor of towering glass structures bathed in vibrant cyan and pink light, where a large guitar advertisement billboard remains a focal point. As the camera drifts leftward, the surrounding skyscrapers gradually shift in perspective, altering the geometry of the architecture against the dark night sky. The scene then expands to highlight the void of pedestrians and vehicles at this elevated altitude, finally settling into a sweeping view of the dense, glowing metropolis.
